main.description: List a range of Bluemoji in a repository. Public read: pass 'repo' to browse any repo's collection. If 'repo' is omitted, the caller must be authenticated and their own collection is listed.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repo to list. Defaults to the authenticated caller if omitted.

limit.description: The number of records to return.

reverse.description: Flag to reverse the order of the returned records. Default is oldest-first (ascending by creation time), mirroring com.atproto.repo.listRecords.
